task.name: Adversarial Review Loop
task.description: Iteratively run adversarial reviews and automatically apply all fixes for N loops.
task.objective: Automate iterative adversarial refinement cycles with auto-fixing and reporting.

step.title: Initialize Loop
step.action: Log start of iterative adversarial review for {{loops}} cycles.

step.title: Iterative Cycle
step.action: If sizeOf({{content}}) > 500 lines OR countFiles({{content}}) > 5: 1. Shard content into domains or line-ranges (if single large file). 2. Launch parallel _bmad/core/tasks/review-adversarial-general.xml for each shard. 3. Perform Collision Check: detect overlapping line edits/file targets. 4. Resolve collisions via Integrator sub-agent if necessary. 5. Merge findings into consolidated fix list. Else: Execute _bmad/core/tasks/review-adversarial-general.xml with content={{content}}, also_consider={{target_feature}}
Execution Validation: On sub-task completion, verify state == 'SUCCESS'. If sub-task failed/errored, log as 'ERROR' and do NOT update early exit pass counter.
Force-select 'all' fixes when prompted by the sub-task.
Log findings and applied fixes for this iteration.
Update content variable with the newly fixed content for the next iteration.
Early Exit Check: If findings count == 0 for 3 consecutive SUCCESSFUL iterations, terminate loop early.

step.title: Finalize and Report
step.action: Output: "Iterative Adversarial Review Complete. {{loops}} cycles finished."
